heading.purpose: Bold uppercase titles and section headings. Display impact for arcade feel.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, descriptions, paragraph content.

label.purpose: Form labels, table headers, navigation items.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, reveal).

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Image scale transitions and reveal animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Arcade-blue background with neon glow on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.60 0.22 235); color: oklch(0.10 0.02 260); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 16px oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Arcade-blue border, transparent background.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.60 0.22 235); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid oklch(0.60 0.22 235); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0.1); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container with arcade-blue neon shelf (2px top border). Hover lifts with glow.
components.html:
Título do Card

Conteúdo do card.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.16 0.03 260); border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.35 0.08 260); border-top: 2px solid oklch(0.60 0.22 235); padding: 1.5rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.96 0.01 260); transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0.15); } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { } .ds-card-text { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.65 0.03 260); margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input with arcade-blue focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.96 0.01 260); line-height: 1; } .ds-input { height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.10 0.02 260); color: oklch(0.96 0.01 260); font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: inherit; border: 1px solid oklch(0.35 0.08 260); transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.65 0.03 260); } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0.5); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Status Badge — Pending
components.description: Shows a report is awaiting review. Arcade-yellow background.
components.css: .ds-badge-pending { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.78 0.2 85); color: oklch(0.10 0.02 260); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.25rem; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Badge — Approved
components.description: Confirmed legitimate report. Success green background.
components.css: .ds-badge-approved { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.65 0.2 145); color: oklch(0.96 0.01 260); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.25rem; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Badge — Rejected
components.description: Report denied by admin. Arcade-pink background.
components.css: .ds-badge-rejected { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.58 0.24 350); color: oklch(0.96 0.01 260); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.25rem; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Report Card (Homepage)
components.description: Image-first grid card with hover overlay, arcade-blue neon shelf, and lightbox dialog.
components.html:
Reporter → Reported

Comentário da denúncia.

26/05/2026
components.css: .ds-report-card { background: oklch(0.16 0.03 260); border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.35 0.08 260); border-top: 2px solid oklch(0.60 0.22 235); overflow: hidden; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.96 0.01 260); transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-report-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0.15); } .ds-report-image-wrap { position: relative; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; } .ds-report-image-wrap::before { content: ''; display: block; padding-top: 66%; background: oklch(0.22 0.04 260); } .ds-report-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0.6); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-report-card:hover .ds-report-overlay { opacity: 1; } .ds-report-info { padding: 0.75rem 1rem 0.5rem; text-align: center; } .ds-report-title { font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .ds-report-comment { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.65 0.03 260); margin: 0; } .ds-report-footer { padding: 0.75rem 1rem; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.35 0.08 260); font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.65 0.03 260); }

components.name: Image Upload Zone
components.description: Drag-and-drop file upload area with dashed border and arcade-blue focus state.
components.html:
Arraste a imagem aqui

ou

JPEG apenas
components.css: .ds-upload-zone { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 2px dashed oklch(0.35 0.08 260 / 0.3); background: oklch(0.22 0.04 260 / 0.2); cursor: pointer; text-align: center; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-upload-zone:hover { border-color: oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0.5); background: oklch(0.22 0.04 260 / 0.3); } .ds-upload-icon { color: oklch(0.65 0.03 260); } .ds-upload-text { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.65 0.03 260); margin: 0; } .ds-upload-small { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.65 0.03 260); margin: 0; } .ds-upload-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.60 0.22 235); color: oklch(0.10 0.02 260); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-upload-btn:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 16px oklch(0.60 0.22 235 / 0.5); }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Top bar navigation item. Muted default, arcade-blue on hover.
components.html: PainelNova DenúnciaPerfilSair
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.65 0.03 260); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.60 0.22 235); text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 4px; } .ds-nav-link-logout { cursor: pointer; }

narrative.overview:
The interface is a Brazilian arcade at night. Deep blue-black backdrop, neon glows, colors that pop against the darkness. Like walking past a row of arcade cabinets — each screen is a portal to a different fight. The player's evidence is front and center, highlighted by electric blue and yellow accents that say 'this matters.'

Built for the Brazilian Street Fighter 6 community. Players who just finished a ranked match where the opponent disconnected, frustrated but looking for a constructive outlet. The design serves that moment: fast, familiar, energetic. No corporate polish, no sterile SaaS — this is a community tool with the soul of an arcade.

The system explicitly rejects generic dark SaaS aesthetics and false authority badges.
keyCharacteristics: Deep blue-black canvas (oklch(0.10 0.02 260)) — darker and cooler than ever
Electric arcade-blue primary action color with neon glow on hover
Arcade-yellow for badges and secondary highlights
Arcade-pink for destructive actions (replaces standard red)
Archivo Black for headings — bold, uppercase, impactful
2px arcade-blue top border on cards as the Neon Shelf signature
Flat at rest, glow on interaction — no shadows when idle

rules.name: The Neon Shelf Rule
rules.body: Every card gets a 2px arcade-blue top border. This is the primary visual signature of the system. Applied consistently across all card surfaces, it creates the sensation of a shelf of arcade cabinets.

rules.name: The Single Glow Rule
rules.body: Only one element per viewport should have active glow at a time. Glow is feedback for the element being interacted with — never decorative, never persistent.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Arcade-blue is reserved for interactive states and feedback — buttons, links, focus rings. Never use it as a surface background or decorative element.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Body text uses system fonts. Headings use Archivo Black exclusively. No pairing, no variable axes. Differentiation comes from weight and scale, not family changes.

rules.name: The Flat Surface Rule
rules.body: A surface at rest has no shadow. Glow appears only on hover or focus as interaction feedback. If a card needs to feel higher, move it one tonal step, not shadow.

dos: Do use the Neon Shelf (2px arcade-blue top border) on all cards
Do use arcade-blue for primary actions, links, and focus indicators
Do use arcade-yellow for pending/warning states
Do use arcade-pink for destructive/rejected states
Do use Archivo Black for headings — uppercase for impact
Do write in pt-BR with the warmth and directness of the Brazilian fighting game community
Do use hover glow (box-shadow with arcade-blue) on buttons and cards
Do keep 150ms transitions on interactive elements
Do show skeleton loading for tables, cards, and detail views
donts: Don't use arcade-blue as a surface or decorative background
Don't use box-shadow at rest — glow is for interaction only
Don't use gradient text or glassmorphism
Don't use modals as a first thought — exhaust inline and progressive disclosure first
Don't use neon/cyberpunk/RGB-gamer aesthetic — arcade is about restraint, not excess
Don't add badges, trust seals, or 'enterprise' signaling
Don't make the design look like a generic dark SaaS admin panel
Don't animate CSS layout properties — use opacity, transform, and color only
Don't use em dashes — substitute commas, colons, or periods
Don't apply color to inactive states — inactive means muted (dusk-text)
Don't use Archivo Black for body text
